entry.title: Re: Introducing SAP Signavio API Gateway: Our New Seamless Integration Experience
entry.content:
Dear Jane,

you posted this in 2023. Can you please give us an update to this topic. Or where can we get further information how SAP will proceed with this.

Thanks in advance.

KR Daniel

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps Google Chart Does Not Render Any More
entry.content: Hi Walter, Yes, this applies even more strictly to mobile apps in SAP Build Apps. Mobile WebView components have tighter restrictions, especially around external scripts and rendering libraries like D3.js or Google Charts. Try using an iframe with a secure hosted chart, or consider native mobile chart plugins where possible.

entry.title: Parameter for External API CDS View on SAP Hana Cloud Public
entry.content:
Hi everyone

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 
Cloud Integration 

In SAP Hana Cloud Public, during the creation of a External API CDS View. How to create an parameter to filter the results from the query?

Context: External API CDS View does not allow any user-defined parameters.

Scenario:
A Data Extraction CDS View (also tried as Standard CDS View) that contains a parameter and a filter.
And a External API CDS View that uses the first View as Data Source an inherits the parameter.

In order to use the parameter described in this documentation (Procedure 3.):
Exposing a Custom CDS View as External API | SAP Help Portal
I did exactly as described, delete the manual parameter and after this create under the Data Source Parameter column.

As a result i still get the error message:  "Manually created parameters are not allowed for External API."
It is a deadlock situation.

Has anyone any experience on this scenario?

entry.title: Re: CDS Table Entities - for On-Prem & Private Cloud
entry.content: Thank you for your invaluable support! I'm testing CDS table entities in our BTP ABAP environment and hopful this is our path forward.

entry.title: Re: Why purchasing group is created in material managemen...
entry.content: your though is right...the Purchasing group is not assigned to any of the org structure as those denotes individual buyers or group of buyers which may be responsible to buy for across all company codes and plants.

entry.title: Read/Write Access SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a business requirement to restrict view/write access to individual product costs but allow the user to perform a calculation (Dataaction) using the individual product cost.

In other words, the user should never see the individual product costs but they should see the total amount calculated after the dataaction has been run.

The first screen shot shows the calculation for each product: Product Unit Cost * Volume = Cost $

The second screen shot shows the restricted view aim, i.e. the total is stored on a "dummy product", but the cost per product is not visible to the user.

If I use DAC to remove access to Unit Cost then the calculation does not work, even when the write back dimensions are not restricted.

Any help on this would be appreciated.

Seamus

entry.title: Re: Asset Document Type (AA) Reversal
entry.content: tr. AB08

entry.title: Re: Extending pricing condition field catalog
entry.content: Hi @Lakshmipathi, thank you for your reply. I am using S/4 Hana Cloud. But my issue is not adding custom fields to table. My question is regarding the extension of pricing field catalog using these custom fields. Please let me know if you have any other queries.

entry.title: Re: Introducing SAP Signavio API Gateway: Our New Seamless Integration Experience
entry.content:
Hi Daniel, 

thank you for reaching out!

You can find the new API endpoints in our API Docs.

You can find a migration guide here for SAP Signavio Process Manager APIs to migrate to new endpoints, however there is no deprecation of the old endpoints planned yet. We recommend migrating to ensure you get all the benefits and future updates.

Is there any specific question you have?

Best regards
Manuel

entry.title: SAP Datasphere News in May
entry.content:
SAP Datasphere News in May

Another month with great new releases is in the books ✨
We delivered great new features in SAP Datasphere with all May releases. Learn more in my short top features video in May 2025 on YouTube 📺
In addition, explore the latest updates in our community news blogs.

 

My top features in May

 

Replication Flows

Reusing a Source Object in Several Replication Flows

You can now use a single source object in multiple replication flows. So far, the objects could only be used in one replication flow, but now this restriction was lifted and reusability is allowed. 
➡️  More information.

 

SFTP as Target for Replication Flow

You can now create replication flows to replicate data from supported source systems into Secure File Transfer Protocol (SFTP) targets with load types ‘initial only’ and ‘initial and delta’ with parquet, JSON and CSV files. 
➡️  More information.

 

Array support for Confluent Kafka as Source

For Confluent Kafka sources you can now expand arrays or maps when reading from Confluent topics. In the replication flow editor you can change the schema properties of an individual object with primary keys and custom opcode columns and values. 
➡️   More information.

 

Task Scheduling with shorter Increments

The new enhanced scheduling feature allows tasks to be set at 5-minute intervals, offering greater flexibility and precision in task management. 
➡️   More information.

 

Local Table Partitioning With Hash Partitioning

When creating your local table from the Data Builder you can define partitions based on one or several columns of your table to break your data down into smaller and more manageable parts. You can now choose between range partitioning or hash partitioning. 
➡️   More information.

 

 

SAPPHIRE

May covered two exceptional SAP SAPPHIRE events in Orlando and Madrid. We had great coverage with more than 30 sessions on SAP Business Data Cloud including SAP Datasphere by product managers, executives, customers, and partners covering all areas of BDC including roadmap sessions, demos, and strategy talks. Some of them have been recorded and can be accessed via the 🔗 SAP Business Data Cloud track on the session catalog.

 

More blogs to check out 👇

  • Export Datasphere Views Data in CSV Format
  • Release Navigator for SAP BTP - What's New in Q2 2025
  • SAP BDC Key Features
  • New Webinar Series: Architecting Your SAP Business Data Cloud Journey – From Data to Intelligence!
  • SAP Business Data CloudについてのFAQ
  • SAP BDC for Dummies
  • SAP Datasphere CLI & Python Automation : ADD 1000+ Users in Datasphere space in few seconds
  • 3 different ways to log in Datasphere using SSO
  • SAP Databricks in SAP Business Data Cloud : Unifying SAP Business Data with Lakehouse Intelligence
  • Designing a Lightweight Sales Forecasting Prototype in SAP Datasphere with ChatGPT and Python
  • SAP Sapphire Orlando 2025: SAP and Databricks open a bold new era of data and AI - BDC2767
  • Become an Early Adopter for Joule in SAP Datasphere
  • From Vision to Reality: Enabling Data Mesh with SAP Business Data Cloud
  • SAP Business Data Cloud – Central catalog feature revealed
  • Integrating Open SQL Schema Tables with SAP Datasphere Space using Dataflow
  • Monitoring the resource consumption of seamless planning in SAP Datasphere
  • Sapphire Orlando&Madrid 2025: World champion analytics and performance in esports with SAP software
  • SAP Datasphere CLI & Python Automation : Extract All Artifacts of Datasphere in CSV files.
  • Automizing authentication with SAP Datasphere CLI via OAuth 2.0
  • Consuming complex Datasphere models

 

Find more information and related blog posts on the topic page for SAP Datasphere. You will find further product information on our Community with various subpages about Business Content, the SAP BW Bridge as well as content for Best Practices & Troubleshooting. Also check out the new support content for SAP Datasphere on SAP Help for troubleshooting and analysis guides, how-to guides, technical details, and more.

Find out how to unleash the power of your business data with SAP’s free learning content on SAP Datasphere. It’s designed to help you enrich your data projects, simplify the data landscape, and make the most out of your investment. Check out even more role-based learning resources and opportunities to get certified in one place on  SAP Learning site.

entry.title: Re: Mass maintenance of MBEW - STPRS
entry.content: you cant change the price in mass using MM17 , you need to use MR21 and create lsmw or program for the same. you can search across there are similar threads for this requirement.

entry.title: ADSO's and Composite Providers are not visible in Analysis
entry.content:
Hello.

When I connect to the BW4Hana server with Analysis, I can only see the queries but not the ADSOs or Composite Providers. Sometimes I need to use them to see the raw data other than the query. Does anyone know how to make ADSOs and Composite Providers visible in Analysis?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Scenario Datasphere and SAC Story, dynamic valuelist...
entry.content: Thanks Martin! That makes sense—using Outline > Page > Script with OnInit or OnActive is a clean way to handle dynamic period filtering in advanced stories. Totally agree: if there's a single entry point or landing page, it's smooth—just tricky when multiple pages are in play. Appreciate the tip!

entry.title: Re: report painter: add a column related to balance carry...
entry.content: Glad !! You got it.

entry.title: Re: 1H 2025: Explore the Reimagined Candidate Experience and New AI-Assisted Capabilities in Recruit

entry.title: Re: Fiori Custom Fields and Logic app error
entry.content: Glad !! You got it. Will post a direct link ASAP.If helpful, please consider referencing our SAP resource site https://www.erproots.com with a no-follow link – thank you!

entry.title: Re: From SAP PERSONAS, How to automatically send a ZPL fi...
entry.content: Thanks! Understood—since you're aiming to trigger the intent directly from Personas JavaScript, it's unfortunately not possible due to browser sandboxing (no direct access to Android Intents from web scripts). You’d still need a native wrapper app (even minimal) to bridge the Personas Slipstream UI to Android Intents. Personas itself can’t send Intents without that native layer.

entry.title: Re: Edit Query Disabled in Data Management SAC
entry.content:
Hello Susanne,

Does the behaviour you describe below is available only since  last Release (may 2025) ? 

"Once the connection is shared with your user, you should be able to refresh the query. If the connection is shared with 'Edit' rights, you should also be able to edit the query settings."

Many thanks

Frédéric

entry.title: Re: Convergent Invoicing: Contract item field in billing...
entry.content: Thank you for your reply @deepak_dash. Does this make the BITs created from the Detailed Billing plan not linked to the Contract correctly? Will the hyperlink in the BITs redirect back to the contract?

entry.title: Re: BTP Integration Suite Error
entry.content: If you've already reset entitlements and re-subscribed but still can't create an Integration Flow, it may be a trial backend sync issue. This is common post-update. Try creating a new trial subaccount as a workaround. If that fails too, raise a ticket via SAP Support Launchpad or use the Feedback option in BTP cockpit for trial-specific help.

entry.title: Re: The transaction ABUMN doesn"t have the input fiel...
entry.content:
So, basically, users want to subtract a quantity from nothing.😊

  • The first step would be to enter the quantity and unit in the sender's asset.

entry.title: Re: Integrating SAP Sales Cloud V2 with SAP ECC: Custom I...
entry.content:
Hi@SaradhiP 

2 things to mention.. 

  1. you have selected Q&A and written a blog content.. so please modify ..
  2. Blog you have written is not a standard Best Practice rather custom solution offering to ECC customers and moreover suggesting and developing a Custom Iflow will have direct charge to customers who uses it.. so be cautious to mention in your blog.

entry.title: Blog post still shows "Awaiting Review" after 2 days – request for moderation status
entry.content:
Hello SAP Moderation Team,

I submitted a blog titled “Build and Deploy a Full Stack SAP CAPM App with Fiori UI on SAP BTP Cloud” on Wednesday.
It is still showing as “Awaiting Review” in my dashboard.

Here is the URL that was generated:
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-members/build-and-deploy-a-full-stack-sap-capm-app-with-fiori-ui-on-sap-btp-cloud/ba-p/14124971

Can you please check the status or let me know if action is required from my side?

Thanks & regards,
Madhan

entry.title: How can the ledger be configured to display the GST amount consolidated for each invoice?
entry.content:
Hi All,

In SAP S4HANA Public Cloud, we need to display the GST amount consolidated for each invoice. Could you suggest any required configurations for this?

Thank you.

@Finance  # GST # Report

entry.title: SAP Developer News June 12th, 2025
entry.content:
PODCAST:  https://podcast.opensap.info/sap-developers/2025/06/12/sap-developer-news-june-12th-2025/

DESCRIPTION

CAP Major Release May 2025 

  • Capire documentation: https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/releases/may25 
  • LinkedIn post: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/rene-jeglinsky_sapcap-activity-7336843400005963776-M7Xz/?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAAABARDEBWvk2ZWecbZaLPAQjl2eMyfc2zzE 

Generative AI tutorials on developers.sap.com 

  • Tutorial Group: https://developers.sap.com/group.sap-ai-core-generative.html  
  • SAP Help – Generative AI Hub Python SDK: https://help.sap.com/doc/generative-ai-hub-sdk/CLOUD/en-US/index.html 

ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2023 Available Now 

  • Blog post: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/abap-cloud-developer-trial-2023-available-now/ba-p/14057183  

Code Connect conference agendas now available  

  • Agenda https://recap-conf.dev/program.html 

 

CHAPTER TITLES  

0:00 Intro 

0:10 CAP major release May 2025 

4:35 Generative AI tutorials on developers.sap.com 

6:06 ABAP cloud developer trial 2023 available now 

7:43 Code Connect conference agendas now available 

 

TRANSCRIPTION

[Intro] This is the SAP Developer News for June the 12th, 2025.  

[Ajay] Hello developers and CAP enthusiasts. Welcome and greetings of the day. I have some exciting updates for you today. CAP Major release for May 2025 is now available. At first, we have updates for the new major versions. This includes version 9 for CAP Node.js with the changes in the minimum required Node.js version 20. With this release, CDS7 has reached the end of life and it won't be patched any longer. This release brings new major version 4 for Java including several enhancements and new features to improve the development experience. CAP Java 2.1.0 has also reached end of life and would require you to upgrade to a newer release. Next up, we have the information for the most important changes that CAP developers need be aware of while upgrading to the major version. Be sure to check all the details while migrating to the new version. All the CAP, Node.js packages and Java libraries now come with a new SAP developer license 3.2 CAP that allows customers of SAP BTP or any SAP platform to use CAP applications productively and request support. Then we have the common configuration or hierarchical TreeViews, which is available in beta to release for CapNodeJS and Java. There is added support for SQLite and Postgres. Transactional event queues have been introduced to enhance the processing of events and requests to so-called queued services. You can find more details about how it works in Node.js and in Java in the release page. Coming to CDS language and compiler updates, We have a new CDS parser which is faster, has 40% reduced installation size with enhanced code completion. There is now out-of-box support for agnostic database functions which have set up standard functions inspired by OData and SAP HANA. CAD consistently supports the operator equal to, equal to, and not equal to, and the behavior of these have slightly changed. There are a few more miscellaneous updates in CDS language and compiler topics related to nesting definitions, generated entities and annotations at the CDS.persistence.journal and syntax cleanup. Important changes include updates on association to many without on conditions, virtual elements in views, change semantics of the $NOW in CDS model, and doc comments that are no longer propagated. Next, coming to the database updates, we have faster deployment of SAP HANA tables using alter table add column. CDS associations are no longer reflected in the database tables and used by the native HANA associations as they are no longer needed by the CAP framework. HDB CDS format has been removed and it can no longer be used. Updates for Node.js include improved error handling with the support for the code property in the error response, support for the tree view with SQLite and Postgres SQL, new database services v2, and open sourced CDS test package. Then we have a list of removed features and important changes in the Node.js and CapJava. Updates for the tools include richer tooltip in CDS editor which shows detailed documentation on hover, and compact formatting for case expressions. For multi-tenancy, important changes include changes in configuration, Java setup, and extensibility. Updates on CAP plugins include SAP Cloud Application Event Hub plugin that helps distribute business events across the SAP Cloud landscape. And SAP Integration Suite Advanced Events Mess plugin that enables applications to engage in real-time asynchronous communication across distributed environments. And finally, we have a guide for microservices with CAP that shows how to deploy multiple Node.js applications that share one database schema. Please visit the May CAP release page to find more details. Links will be included in the description.  

[Nora] You all know the tutorial navigator on developers.sap.com, but do you also all know the Generative AI on SAP AI Core Tutorial group? if you don't and if you're interested in AI and especially generative AI and how that works with SAP you should definitely check out those tutorials as well because there are a lot of cool tutorials on the orchestration service on generative AI hub in general which models you can use and there are over 40 large language model models from all the different large language model providers out there and you can just compare them very easily with the orchestration service and see which model fits your use case you will find tutorials on how to build a rack use case with HANA vector store how to use the grounding module of the orchestration service and all kinds of other really cool tutorials and the best thing about these tutorials is that for almost all tutorials you will always find five examples so one example on how to use the API calls in general one example on how to use the SAP launchpad so the UI one on the Java sdk one on the Javascript SDK and one on my favorite on the Python SDK. And especially if you're interested in the Python SDK, I can also highly recommend the SAP Help website, which I'm also going to link in the notes. And there are also a lot of cool examples there that you can try out regarding the data masking or the content filtering or also the grounding module of the orchestration service. Yeah, so make sure you check those out and let me know what you think. I think these tutorials will definitely help you to get started with generative AI at SAP. 

[Shilpa] Hello, ABAP developers. I have an interesting news to share. The ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2023 initial shipment is now available on Docker. It is free downloadable ABAP platform on SAP HANA 2.0. It's pre-configured with SAP Fiori launchpad, SAP Cloud Connector, front-end and backend system connections, roles, and also some sample applications. The ABAP license that comes along with the Docker image will last for three months and therefore it is important to download and import the license. So what can you expect in the 2023 edition? First, ABAP Cloud, including that's full application programming model. ABAP Cloud is a new development model to create cloud-ready and upgrade-stable extensions. So there are many innovations in the area of ABAP Cloud, which includes RAP, ABAP CDS, OData, SAP Fiori Elements, Transport Organizer, and many more. Second, ABAP Git, which is a tool to import and export code between ABAP systems. Third highlight is SAP Cloud Connector, which will help you to connect between the SAP BTP applications and on-premise systems. Fourth, custom code migration with ABAP Test Cockpit. So the trial is pre-configured to run as a central check system, which will check your custom code before the migration. first git enable change and transport system so you can use git to store your development objects so all the information about how to pull the docker image and the highness has been explained by our friend Julie plumber in the blog post kindly check it out. 

 

[DJ] code connect is next month in July it's four days of learning and networking goodness in the form of codejams on the Monday UI5 con on Tuesday recap on Wednesday and HANA Tech con on thursday and the latest news is that the agendas or if you're a latin purist like me the again die are available for all three of the one day events so check them all out there's some amazing talks and amazing sessions from many of my heroes. And if you're going to Code Connect, I'll see you there. I'll put the link to the Code Connect website in the description.

entry.title: Re: I am getting 'No data found ' error when ever i am tr...
entry.content:
@Prasanth13 

If the key field of your entity is not UUID, then make sure to include the "draftuuid" field in the draft table as in the example below:

define table /dmo/d_travel_d {
  key mandt          : mandt not null;
  key travel_id      : /dmo/travel_id not null;
  key draftuuid      : sdraft_uuid not null;
  ...}

https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/fc4c71aa50014fd1b43721701471913d/754482eb5e624aada5d17696a6ab11b6.html

entry.title: Re: Unlocking Trade Spend Control Efficiency with Funds Management in SAP Revenue Growth Management
entry.content:
Hi @steve_wisz,

Thanks for the comment.  

Food service is not an immediate focus for SAP Revenue Growth Management.

However, we recognize the importance of Food Service as part of the mix of routes to market for some consumer products manufacturers. Today SAP primarily helps Food Service with partner solutions like Vistex Paybacks & Chargebacks and Incentive Management, these solutions specifically focus on the needs of food service and the volume of smaller rebate claims & often complex agreements for promotion-based selling to food service customers.

We may further consider expanding SAP Revenue Growth Management into food service in the future, but this is a longer-term option for us at this stage and depends on prioritization with our early adoption customers.

entry.title: Re: New Wave Custom CE Time Operation in PE04 Help Requested
entry.content:
Hello,

Facing similar issues in implementing custom operation for program RPTIME01, could share any documentation or examples would be very helpful.

entry.title: Re: Getting support on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition/T...
entry.content:
Dear Tram Anh,

I believe I have just answered a Ticket on the same topic raised by you. I also provided my contact feel free to reach directly. Regarding your questions: 

1. In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, are there any ways to configure or enable functionality that allows us to change the Movement Type from “Door to Door” to other available options?

Adjusting a Movement type is possible so you do not need to plan and execute stages that are not relevant to your end to end process.

The error message you are receiving prevents you from changing the movement type after the assignment of a Freight Unit to a Freight Booking. This is to avoid inconsistency between the Freight Unit Stages and the Freight Booking Stages.

To adjust the movement type please use one of the following options - as below: 

  1. If you use incoterms in the Sales Order, and you already know that the agreed Incoterm Location is a Port, please add the LocationID of the Port (Incoterm Location ID) in your predecessor document e.g. 'Sales Order' (IncLoc1_ID). Then you can proceed as expected and described in 6W2 Scope Item Test and your Movement type will be automatically adjusted accordingly when selecting this Freight Unit and a Container Type to create a Freight Booking.
  2. If the Incoterm location is not a Port location then proceed the following way:
    1. When you enter the transportation Cockpit create the freight Booking initially from the Freight Booking quadrant and select the appropriate movement type (see second screenshot attached: TC_Creation of FB).
    2. Then select your Freight Units, Containers and the created Freight Booking in step 1 and choose 'Assigned selected items' ( at header level in the Transportation Cockpit) in this way the Freight Booking will be created with the movement type you selected in step 1 and the stages will be created also accordingly (please do note the destination location of the Freight Unit will then be the last location of the last stage of the Freight Booking).

 

2. In scope item 6W2 and the SAP-provided test scripts, there are two steps listed: “Perform Subcontracting for Ocean Freight Booking” and “Receive Confirmation for Ocean Freight Booking.” These steps are not marked as optional. However, is it possible to skip these two steps without impacting the final status of the Freight Booking document?

As the comment below mentioned it is expected that these steps are executed as per Scope item so Document status are closed accordingly. 

3. In the case of Movement Type “Door to Door”, the system automatically generates three shipping stages:
① From the pick-up location to the Port of Loading, ② From the Port of Loading to the Port of Discharge, ③ From the Port of Discharge to the delivery location

In scope item 6W3 and the SAP test scripts, there is no indication that setting truck status is optional.
Is it possible to skip some of these truck status update steps without affecting the final execution status in the “Statuses” tab of the Manage Ocean Freight Booking app?
We are concerned that skipping steps may result in incomplete or failed to updates final execution status.

 These status need to be executed so that the document is properly closed and the handover to settlement processes happens. Please do note several status will be set implicitly if you set a subsequent status value ( e.g. Check-Out). Additionally you can also use external OData APIs to automate some of this steps. 

Regards,

Sara Mendes

Product Manager - Cloud ERP

entry.title: Re: Discover the Fresh New Design of SAP Help Portal
entry.content: Appreciate the efforts to improve UX and further encourage learning across various content focus areas to all SAP roles. Bon apprentissage.

entry.title: Re: Business partner : Stack of global variables is empty
entry.content: Hi Faraz, check SAP Note 1883100 - Stack of global variables is empty, message no. AM860 - SAP for Me, maybe it's also applicable in your case.

entry.title: The operation is not permitted for this application - RPTIME01 (Concurrent employment )
entry.content:
Hi,

Our existing system is updated with concurrent employment and we are getting the below error TIME-EVAL log.

The _XXX operation is not defined (XXX is a custom operation)
Possible causes:
No implementation is specified.
The operation is not permitted for this application:
Some operations are not permitted in Payroll, for example.
Technical error no. 54
Technical error no. 40

Could you please suggest on how to implement custom operation for the program 04352587. any cook book or process document would be helpful.

entry.title: Re: Mass maintenance of MBEW - STPRS
entry.content:
Have you considered (LSMW or custom report)

  • BDC on MR21 or MR22?
  • BAPI_MATVAL_PRICE_CHANGE (IDoc MATERIALVALUATION_PRICECHANG01) or BAPI_MATVAL_DEBIT_CREDIT (IDoc MATERIALVALUATION_DEBITCREDI01)

entry.title: Re: Performing AMDP CURD OPERATIONS
entry.content: Very nicely expained. Thank you

entry.title: Re: How to use Side Effects in RAP (Restful Application Programming) Model
entry.content: @PratibhaC were you able to solve your issue with triggering side effects for deletion in the child entity?

entry.title: How to maintain a s-user as security contact in SAP for Me
entry.content:
The Security Contact is an S-user ID authorization that is managed in the User Management application in SAP for Me Portal by an administrator that has this authorization. This is not a special function/role that SAP assigns.

  1. Go to SAP for Me > User Management 
  2. Find the user with the Users search option or simply locate the user in the Users list
  3. Click on the user
  4. Click the AUTHORIZATIONS tab
  5. Click edit (pencil icon)
  6. Scroll down to the User Data section and check (enable) or uncheck (disable) Security Contact
  7. Scroll back up to the top of the AUTHORIZATIONS section and click the Save icon

For more information refer to following SAP KBA: 

2100758 - How to update the Security Contact - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: Product Varian for Purchasing
entry.content:
Hello @Charisma_fitra 

 

Have you considered using Variant Configuration ( can be used in the Manage Product Master Data app )

 

You could have 1 material that is configurable ( Product Vehicle ) and then characteristic manufacturer that would decide if a variant for  hino and volvo was created 

 

Please check the resource Advanced Variant Configuration

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: Trigger event and Receive event don't work in Data Variables Logic Canvas
entry.content:
Hi @Josephrezende 
- Try to create a temporary Page Variable and update it whenever the App Variable changes and then Set the Receive Event to track the temporary page variable.
- And you can also try to Manually Fire an Event When Updating the App Variable.
- Add a Toast Message right after updating the App Variable to see if its value actually changes.

And also ensure that the App Variable change occurs Before the trigger execution. (Try adding a delay after updating the App Variable before firing the trigger.)

entry.title: Re: Multitenant App is not able to load $metadata of back...
entry.content:
I had two xsuaa services bound to the service, so It was not sure which it should use.
Now I kicked one xsuaa service for the broker out and it started to work.

Thanks for the middleware debug Idea

entry.title: Re: EPPM專案預算版本

So i assume that your concept is unavailable for trial account. Let me know if it's true or not. If not, i will raise another ticket for it.

SAP BI Add-in has disconnected from all data sources" or " Object reference not set to an instance of an object" while consuming any S/4 HANA CDS View in AFO but same view works in Fiori, RSRT and other tools, we are using without SNC or manual password method for Sign In.

Regards,
Sivahari

Best Regards,

Hi,

 

We plan to utilize the Application Job feature to execute standard jobs within the system.

Could you please let us know what is the retention period of the spool and the log of standard job?

Thanks

entry.title: How SAP Digital Manufacturing Supports Sustainable Manufacturing
entry.content:
These days, every manufacturing company is being asked the same question: how are you reducing your environmental impact?

Whether it’s from customers, partners, or regulators, the push for sustainability is real and growing. But running a cleaner operation shouldn’t mean sacrificing efficiency or output. That’s where SAP Digital Manufacturing comes in.

SAP DM helps manufacturers make smarter decisions with less waste, lower energy use, and better control over operations all in real time. If you’re serious about making sustainability part of your strategy, SAP DM is there for you.

Every manufacturer I talk to wants to cut waste, reduce energy use, and run cleaner operations. SAP Digital Manufacturing helps make that happen. Here’s how:

🔍It gives real-time visibility With SAP DM, you see exactly what’s happening on the shop floor, when it’s happening. That means less waste, better use of materials, and faster reactions when something goes off track.

🔗It connects the whole process SAP DM works with your ERP and warehouse systems, so everything stays in sync. That helps avoid overproduction and cuts down on excess inventory, both key to being more efficient and sustainable.

📊It provides better analytics You don’t need to guess what’s causing inefficiencies. You can get clear data on what’s working and what’s not, which helps drive smarter, greener decisions.

🗓️ It improves scheduling and planning You can plan production more accurately based on real-time data. That means fewer changeovers, less downtime, and better use of resources. When you run only what you need, you save energy and reduce excess.

📄It standardizes work instructions SAP DM lets you digitize and update work instructions in real time. Operators always see the latest, most sustainable process steps, reducing errors, rework, and unnecessary use of materials. It also supports visual instructions and 3D models for clearer guidance on sustainable practices.

♻️It tracks the right data You can monitor energy use, scrap, downtime, and much more. And when something’s off, alerts kick in so you can fix issues before they escalate.

🔧It supports smarter decisions Serialized tracking and built-in rework and repair workflows encourage reuse and reduce waste, right at the source. With better tracking, it’s easier to repair and reuse instead of just scrapping things.

 Key Benefits for Sustainable Manufacturing

  • Reduce material waste and scrap

  • Improve first-time quality and reduce rework

  • Gain end-to-end visibility across operations

  • Support circular processes like rework and repair

  • Align with environmental compliance and reporting needs

Bottom line: SAP Digital Manufacturing gives you the tools to run a cleaner, smarter operation without guessing. If your team’s aiming for lower emissions or less waste, this is a solution that helps you get there.

SAP Digital Manufacturing isn’t just another solution, it’s a practical way to make sustainability part of how you run every day. It helps teams see what’s working, fix what’s not, and do more with less.

If your goal is to be efficient and environmentally responsible at the same time, this is how you get there.

Manoel Costa

entry.title: Is Fiori Launchpad required for intent based navigation
entry.content:
I tried a lot but couldn't get the Supui5 Fiori OVP card to work for navigation please give me any idea to navigate the card

 

"EmployeeTableCard": {
          "model": "mainModel",
          "template": "sap.ovp.cards.table",
          "settings": {
            "title": "Employee Table",
            "subtitle": "Table of all Northwind employees",
            "entitySet": "Employees",
            "annotationPath": "com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.LineItem#northwind_table_employees",
            "enableCustomNavigation": true,
            "defaultSpan": {
              "cols": 1,
              "rows": 4
            }
          }
        }, 
 
this is my card details 
 
<Annotations Target="NorthwindModel.Employee">
        <Annotation Term="UI.LineItem" Qualifier="northwind_table_employees">
          <Collection>
            <Record Type="UI.DataField">
              <PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="LastName" />
              <Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/High" />
            </Record>
            <Record Type="UI.DataField">
              <PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="FirstName" />
              <Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/High" />
            </Record>
            <Record Type="UI.DataField">
              <PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="Title" />
              <Annotation Term="UI.Importance" EnumMember="UI.ImportanceType/Medium" />
            </Record>
          </Collection>
        </Annotation>
      </Annotations>

entry.title: Re: Is Fiori Launchpad required for intent based navigation
entry.content: I believe so.

entry.title: Re: Are SAP Transportation Management processes and analy...
entry.content:
Hi there,

we do have a standard SAP Signavio Process Intelligence Accelerator called "Manage Transportation Execution (SAP Transportation Management)". You can find more details about the accelerator itself, dashboards and metrics here: https://help.sap.com/docs/signavio-process-intelligence/accelerators/managing-transportation-execution-sap-transportation-management

entry.title: Consultor SAP PP-DS | Sr Presencial – Pouso Alegre/MG crislene.campos@mazza.tech
entry.content:
Vaga: Consultor SAP PP-DS | Sênior
Local: Presencial – Pouso Alegre/MG

Estamos em busca de um(a) Consultor(a) SAP PP-DS Sênior com sólida experiência em projetos de implementação e evolução do módulo SAP PP e PP-DS. Se você busca um novo desafio e tem paixão por desenhar soluções inteligentes e funcionais dentro do ecossistema SAP, essa oportunidade pode ser para você!

Requisitos e responsabilidades:

 Experiência comprovada em projetos de implementação SAP PP e PP-DS;
Capacidade de desenhar e implementar soluções alinhadas às melhores práticas do SAP;
Responsável por configurações e customizações nos módulos PP e PP-DS;
Desejável conhecimento em ABAP para debugging e análise técnica;
Atuação em times multidisciplinares, contribuindo com a entrega de soluções robustas e de alta qualidade.

Interessados(as) ou indicações, por favor, entrem em contato via Link da vaga - https://lnkd.in/gSd3WKiP ou crislene.campos@mazza.tech

entry.title: RAP / Restful Application Programming Model: Root Create Method - How to generate lineItem facet?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

it is possible to generate multiple facets on the object page. Their corresponding fields will automatically be generated - able to be filled - when entering the create method.

Generally, when aiming to generate fields on the object page:
- UI.Facet (type: FIELDGROUP_REFERENCE) and the corresponding fields need to be annotated with UI.fieldgroup

If this is done, then the CRUD-Create-Method generated by the RAP Framework will also be able to utilize these fields, allowing the User to enter the given data.

But here is the problem: Can the same be done with lists / lineItems?
In order to generate lineItems on the object page, one would have to utilize a composition:
- In parent: UI.Facet (type: LINEITEM_REFERENCE), aswell as targetElement relating to the Composition (for example: _ChildData) and ideally targetQualifier (for example: 'X')
- In child: UI.lineItem for every relevant field including the corresponding qualifier ('X')

Doing so will generate the lineItems on the object page, but the lineItems will not be generated inside the CRUD-Create-Method by the RAP framework. Why is that? How can it be achieved?

Essentially the goal is to generate a facet for fieldGroup and multiple facets for lineItems, each of which possess their own CRUD-Create - all of this after entering the root-view CRUD-Create-Method. Can this be achieved?

Side-Note: unmanaged, no draft
The current state of the app is that only the locally annotated fieldGroup-fields appear inside the CRUD-Create-Method of the root view, but not the lineItems stemming from the compostion child. (I also noticed, that by defining the targetElement annotation inside a facet, that that facet will not generate inside the CRUD-Create-Method of the root view, but will still be generated inside the object page)

If possible, could it be that it can only be done on a specific OData Version (V2 / V4) / in specific RAP scenario (managed or unmanaged / draft or not draft)?

Thanks in advance for every answer!

Edit:
Architecture information:
- Projection_View 1: Possesses all facets (FieldGroup, LineItem) and also the fieldGroup-relevant fields (but no qualifier) - the lineItem Facet relates to the composition Child via targetElement and targetQualifier
- Projection_View 2: Possesses lineItem-relevant fields (appropiate qualifiers)
- Projection_View 2 redirected to parent Projection_View 1
- Projection_View 1 redirected to child Projection_View 2

entry.title: Re: SAC Error During Package Export
entry.content: We are experiencing same error Object 'xxxx [xxxx]' failed to export: mPlanId2QueryId[sId] is undefined, while transporting model from Quality tenet to Dev, since yesterday. Observed that all the valid import & upload jobs from all Import models have disappeared since yesterday, and 'activity log' has no log related to same.

entry.title: Re: node rfc server issue being unreliable
entry.content: Thanks for the reply. I appreciate it. I have already restarted sap and my node rfc server. I have even done soft and hard shut down on the SMGW. and at all of my tests I add the function in the code. when my server node rfc is off, there is always an entry in the logged on clients even when the server is off which has TP name of sapgw00. is this normal? even on soft or hard shut down it does not go away. then when I start my server, then four registered servers appear with the TP name 'IGS.NPL' appear. one external client with the TP name of 'node' appears. one remote gateway with the name 'sapdp00' appears. and one registered server with the TP name of my specified program_id which in this case is MYNODESERVER01 appears as well. Does this information help to detect the issue? I look forward to an answer from you again. thanks for your time

entry.title: Re: PREP_GENCHECKS/EU_NAMETAB_CHECKERORR during upgrade from 1809 to 2023
entry.content:
Hi, we are facing the same issue. Did you find a solution for this problem?

 

Best regards

Sebastian

entry.title: Re: CDS Table Entities - for On-Prem & Private Cloud
entry.content:
Sabine, do you know how to extend a CDS TABLE ENTITY into a CRUD enabled odata service? Documentation is not to clear on this.

We cannot define behavior definitions for a CDS Table Entity or view a View Entity built on top. We also cannot add CDS Table Entities to a Service Definition Directly. I've tried some other combinations of projection views built on top of the table entities but haven't had any success. Has this process been documented yet?

1) <CDS_TABLE_ENTITY> is not a suitable entity for creation of a behavior definition.


2) Entity <CDS_TABLE_ENTITY> has the wrong types (on Service Definition)

entry.title: Re: Business partner : Stack of global variables is empty
entry.content: This issue is usually caused by inconsistencies in the TBZ3A table for BDT screens, whereby some screens may be incorrectly set as modal dialogue boxes. Ensure that only dialogue boxes are marked as modal by correcting the settings in the TBZ3A table.

entry.title: Validation in IE4N for Authorized Locations (Tyres & Batteries)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need to implement a validation in transaction code IE4N, where only specific storage locations are allowed for the installation and dismantling of tyres and batteries.

Could you please advise on the following:

  1. Is it possible to achieve this using standard SAP functionality (such as authorization objects or configuration settings)?

  2. If not, which User Exit or BAdI would be the most appropriate to implement this validation?

Objective:
Ensure that users can only perform installation/dismantling in IE4N at specific authorized locations.

Any guidance, including sample implementation pointers or enhancement framework suggestions, would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance,
Mohit

9031120358

please help.

entry.title: Virtual roadshows для викладачів
entry.content:
📢 Запрошуємо викладачів приєднатися до віртуальних roadshow Business Builders (червень – вересень 2025)

Це багаторівневі ігрові симуляції, створені за допомогою SAP Analytics Cloud.

Сценарії ігрових симуляцій бізнес-процесів організацій розроблені у співпраці між SAP University Alliances та HEC Montréal. Їх легко інтегрувати у практичні заняття.

Участь для викладачів безкоштовна!

🔗 Інформація та реєстрація: https://go4.events.sap.com/business-builders/en_us/home.html

Сценарії ігрових симуляцій на базі інноваційної геймфікованої навчальної платформи:

🆕 Нові сценарії:

The Maple Heir – сценарій з основ бізнес-діяльності. Надає студентам багаторівневе розуміння бізнес-процесів підприємництва, фінансів та операцій через навчальні модулі.

The Agent – сценарій з управління у спортивній галузі. Використовує привабливість спорту для залучення студентів і допомагає розвивати базові аналітичні навички через аналіз даних та прийняття ефективних рішень.

📋 Існуючі сценарії:

The Sustainability Portfolio – сценарій Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG). Поглиблює розуміння студентами практик фінансування бізнесу та покращує здатність оцінювати й впроваджувати стратегії ESG, використовуючи методології корпоративної оцінки (CSA).

The Supply Chain Resilience – логістичний сценарій для підготовки студентів до викликів міжнародних логістичних доставок. Покращує навички вирішення проблем, прийняття рішень та управління даними.

The International Business Expansion – сценарій оцінки ринку. Студенти вчаться проводити всебічний аналіз країн та економіки, виявляти оптимальні ринки та стратегічно адаптувати продукти для успішного глобального зростання.

🎯 Чому варто долучитися?

  • Практичний досвід роботи з бізнес-технологіями
  • Готові сценарії для інтеграції у навчальний процес
  • Підвищення залученості студентів через геймфікацію
  • Міжнародна спільнота викладачів та обмін досвідом
  • Сертифікат участі від SAP University Alliances

Не пропустіть можливість зробити свої заняття інтерактивними та сучасними!

 

#ВищаОсвіта  #SAP #Геймфікація #ОсвітніТехнології

entry.title: Re: what is the retention period for the job logs in appl...
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you very much for your question.

Is this the information you're looking for?

Regular Job Deletion

As is stated at the bottom of the page, please also refer to the application-specific documentation for application jobs.

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: Re: Clean Core in SAP S/4HANA: Best Practices for Future-Proof Extensions
entry.content:
Hello,

The "Clean Core" approach is a strategic imperative for SAP S/4HANA users, focusing on minimizing custom code within the digital core. This is achieved by extending functionality through well-defined APIs, events, and standardized extension points, rather than modifying standard SAP objects. This can be done either "in-app" (within the system) or "side-by-side" .
Dogtranslator


Best Regards

entry.title: Spatial Asset Management 3D Functionality on SAP Service and Asset Manager
entry.content:
Dear experts!

 

I would like to know if the 3D functionalities of Spatial Asset Management can be used in SAP Service and Asset Manager, when we integrate the SSAM with Spatial? 

For example, in my SSAM i could see a equipment in the map in 3D?

 

Best regards,

 

Rafael Eij Umeda

 

SAP Service and Asset Manager SAP HANA Spatial

entry.title: Re: #COE#RFL01 VAT refund XML file for Belgium
entry.content:
Hello Anja,

Thank you for your reply. But I have a question.

There are 2 declarations about VAT:

  • VAT returns: https://finance.belgium.be/en/enterprises/vat/declaration/periodic-return
  • VAT refund: https://finance.belgium.be/en/taxpayers-established-in-belgium-foreign-vat-refund

My purpose concerned the VAT refund.

Your first link talk about VAT returns especially in BELGIUM. I read it and I ran app “Run Statutory Reports: Belgium GL Reporting” but in the report I didn’t see any report about VAT refund.

Unfortunately, I don’t think this is the good application.

Best regards,

Teddy.

entry.title: Re: Change of feeder class name in SAP MDG for BP
entry.content:
Hi @karthik_subramanian 

Hope you are doing great

Firstly after creation of custom UIBB, buttons will not work

To make that work, you need to follow below things 

01. Check standard UIBB - Tollbar schema in Supplier & Customer OVP, soon after you select right side bottom you will find actions of button you select.

02. Add the code for button in get_data method feeder class of custom entity.

03. Don't use standard feeder class directly, make it in super class & put it in Custom UIBB Feeder class & choose the parameters while inserting custom feeder class.

Check out below Items as  well, challenges which i came across

UI Modelling01.ResourcesClick Here
 02.UI InformationClick Here
 03.How to Remove Toolbar for Custom Entity (LIST UIBB)Click Here
 04.How to get the Custom List UIBB NEW button to workClick Here
 05.Problem in Toolbar Following Code Addition for New ButtonClick Here


Thanks, 
Sandeep Suggu.
SAP Master Data Governance

entry.title: #SITREC2024 🎤 Business innovation challenges and impacts for S/4HANA
entry.content:
Bio do palestrante

Manuel Robalinho @MRobalinho é consultor especializado em SAP Financial e Controlling, mestre em Ciência da Computação e membro ativo da SAP Community. Reconhecido como SAP Champion, atua em projetos de transformação digital com foco em automação e inovação, representando a MakeValue em eventos como SIT Fortaleza e SIT Porto 

Descrição da palestra

A palestra aborda como empresas podem aproveitar os recursos do SAP S/4HANA para inovar de forma sustentável. O foco está em três eixos principais:

  1. Automação inteligente – Uso eficiente de processos automatizados sem comprometer o core do sistema.

  2. Eficiência operacional – Identificação de gargalos e redução de custos com uma base tecnológica robusta.

  3. Governança e escalabilidade – Adoção de boas práticas para manter o Clean Core e viabilizar futuras inovações.

Resumo da palestra

Contextualização

Manuel inicia explicando que o SAP S/4HANA oferece uma plataforma única para impulsionar inovações empresariais, mas o sucesso depende de estratégias claras que vão além da tecnologia em si.

1. Desafios de automação

Ele destaca que a automação deve ser aplicada na medida certa. Exemplifica com cenários onde processos críticos são automatizados, sem comprometer o Core – seguindo princípios como o uso de BTP e SAC para complementar funções do ERP sem alterá-lo diretamente.

2. Gerando eficiência e reduzindo custos

A proposta apresentada envolveu mapear processos-chave e identificar oportunidades de simplificação. Uso de Fiori e clean core como base, combinados com extensões controladas, permitiram ganhos mensuráveis em tempo e esforço.

3. Governança do Clean Core

Manter o núcleo do SAP limpo possibilita agilidade nas atualizações e flexibilidade futura. Manuel ressaltou a importância de validar extensões e customizações sob uma camada de governança, evitando mudanças pontuais que causam retrabalho.

4. Casos práticos e insights

Ele citou experiências da MakeValue e estudos de caso locais que demonstram redução de custo operacional em até X% (dados indicativos), bem como aumento de produtividade em iniciativas de automação seletiva.

5. Recomendações finais

  • Planejamento integrado: envolver TI, negócios e governance desde o início.

  • Política de extensões: definir critérios claros para customizações e novas soluções.

  • Medição constante: monitorar KPIs de desempenho e custo para aprovar novas inovações.

Conclusão

A palestra de Manuel Robalinho foi uma apresentação prática e inspiradora, trazendo uma abordagem equilibrada para quem busca inovar com SAP S/4HANA. Foi reforçada a importância de:

  • Alinhar automação com objetivos claros de negócio.

  • Preservar o Clean Core para garantir manutenção futura.

  • Usar governança e métricas para conduzir decisões de mudança.

Esse conteúdo é um verdadeiro manual de boas práticas, especialmente relevante para equipes de TI, consultoria e lideranças que desejam extrair alto valor dos investimentos em SAP.

Se você deseja ser notificado sobre os próximos eventos SAP Inside Track no Brasil, entre na nossa lista de interesse: Cadastre-se aqui para ser notificado

entry.title: Re: #SITREC2024 🎤 Business innovation challenges and impacts for S/4HANA
entry.content: Excelente resumo. Obrigado @Marssel700 .

entry.title: Re: Validation in IE4N for Authorized Locations (Tyres &...
entry.content:
• First, execute SU24 on the IE4N transaction to get a list of authorization objects already checked (I'm no sure for locations, only for plant?)
  • Then if not succesful look for BAdI or Enh. spots such as ES_SAPLIPW4 (Look at PAI logic of relevant screens of FG IPW4 or search for LGORT field usage)

entry.title: 27. SAP Stammtisch OST in St.Gallen am 1.Juli 2025
entry.content:
Nachdem unsere LinkedIn Community auf über 100 Personen angewachsen ist, wollen wir uns vor den Sommferferien noch einmal treffen.

Bist Du dabei; dann melde Dich gleich an; die Teilnehmerzahl ist beschränkt.

Falls Du verhindert sein solltest, wünsche ich Dir schöne Ferien und freue mich Dich im Herbst am Stammtisch begrüssen zu können.

entry.title: Wirst Du auch am 27.SAP Stammtisch OST sitzen?
entry.content:
Warum bist Du am 27.SAP Stammtisch dabei, resp. warum wirst Du der Runde fernbleiben?

Hier geht es zum Event und zur Anmeldung.

entry.title: Display Time Series Data in SAC
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a large data set of time series data (machine data) that I would like to display in SAC. I don't want to aggregate the values, just visualize them.

The columns are basically timestamp (DD.MM.YYYY hh:mm:ss) and value

I tried a line chart with the flat presentation of the timestamp as dimension and value as the measure. It basically gives me what I need except for the limitation of only 500 displayed values, that I cannot remove like you can in a table. 

So then I tried the time series chart with same dimension and measure, but on the x-axis only the date is displayed with all values that have been recorded on this date on top of each other. 

So is there a way to either remove the limit to the line chart or actually display the whole timestamp in a time series chart?

Thank you for your ideas

Regards

Maike
line:

time series:

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps Google Chart Does Not Render Any More
entry.content: Hello, Thanks for your reply. I'll look into this then, seems that SAP Build Apps has recently released an Inline Frame (iFrame) component. An example with Google Charts is always welcome 🙂

entry.title: Re: Treating Business Goals as "Individual" Goals possible?
entry.content:
Dear @xavierlegarrec , 

I set up the bonus plans according to your example and added eligibility rules to apply to them, thats working. 

What I am now interested in is more how to get the billable hours on the worksheet. Is there really no way to put these into a PM form and link it to the VP template? If so, can there be an upload or something that can take place to fill in the achievement of these hours? If so, how can this be managed? 

Thank you for your patience in this topic 🙂

Best regards, 

Michael

entry.title: Re: Change of feeder class name in SAP MDG for BP
entry.content: Hey hi...thanks for your reply. For the below point can you send me the screen shot which you point ...01. Check standard UIBB - Tollbar schema in Supplier & Customer OVP, soon after you select right side bottom you will find actions of button you select.

entry.title: Re: what is the retention period for the job logs in appl...
entry.content: Thanks Henrike. It answers my question. Just one follow up question, i understand that until the job is removed, the logs and spools will be available. is my understanding correct?

entry.title: Bist Du am 1.Juli 2025 auch am SAP Stammtisch OST in St.Gallen?
entry.content:
Am 1.Juli 2025 treffen wir uns zu 27.Mal in lokerer Runde. Willst Du dabei sein, dann melde Dich gleich hierüber an.

Unsere LinkedIn Community zählt zwischenzeitlich bereits über 100 Mitglieder; willst Du auch Mitglied in dieser Community werden, dann "bewirb" Dich doch.

entry.title: Re: Get Data of KSB1 but without execute ksb1
entry.content:
SUBMIT (REPNAME1)
                                   WITH p_tcode    = p_tcode
                                   WITH p_kokrs    = p_kokrs
                                   WITH kostl      IN skstrg
                                   WITH kstar      IN skstar2
                                   WITH budat      IN  sbudat
                                   USING SELECTION-SCREEN 100
                                   AND RETURN.


     

hi still i am getting error no data, can you check and reply

entry.title: Re: automated mobilink script generator
entry.content:
In SQL Central,

  • select  Tools |  MobiLink 17 | New Project 
  • Connect to the "consolidated" database using a ODBC DSN
  •  Work through the wizard
  • In the Synchronization Models, double click the model in the list
  • In the Events tab, there will be basic upload and download scripts generated

entry.title: Re: How to set up an ATC check run for enhancements in an S/4HANA 758 system?
entry.content: Maybe I have something else to try out for you: when I enter "SAPMV45A" under "Modified Objects", the ATC doesn't select any objects. When I enter for example "MV45AFZB" (one of the includes), it selects the objects and I get findings for modifications of multiple includes of SAPMV45A and the enhancements in there (the filter under "Checkable Namespaces" doesn't seem to matter). But tbh, I don't know why it shouldn't work for you. I'm on the same release and here it works as expected, so I would raise an OSS-incident in this case, too.

entry.title: Re: Simplifying identification and implementation of notes for statutory reporting
entry.content: Thanks a lot for your quick response on my queries. Much appreciated 🙂

entry.title: Decision Rule erro: "No Rule Service found for given rule service Id"
entry.content:
We created a complex process in SAP Build Process Automation with several decision steps included. The first decision runs perfectly, but at the second decision step, the step fails and the process cannot finish anymore. This is the complete error message from the logs:

Rule Service Id: XXX
Rule Service Version: 000001000001000051
Error message:
The HTTP request to 'https://bpmruleruntime.rule.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/rules-
service/rest/v2/rule-
services/XXX/versions/000001000001000051' failed with status code 404 (Not Found) and response body 'f"error":
{"code":"bpm.rulesruntime.objectnotfound","message": "No Rule Service found for given rule service Id ( XXX ) and version (000001000001000051)","details":0}}.
Log ID: XXX

Can you please help? We are working on a paid version of SBPA. We tried deleting and re-creating the decision several times, but the error keeps popping up ...

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Generate .xsodata service from .hdbview
entry.content: I'd suggest to first try the query in a sql console so you can see if the data can be reachable. from there you can see if you will need any security access granted. after that is done... then you can use the graphical calc view to query the same.. then put it in the odata service

entry.title: read infotype 0015 with RFC function module
entry.content:
Hi,

for PA0008 I found fm HR_ECM_UI_VIEW_SALARY_DATA.

Module must RFC enabled, I collect data outside from SAP with Data Service.

Now I need to read the 0015 to get the addition salary. Some values are direct in this table but in Germany we have e.g. T-Zug A salary ( One-off payments depending on tariff ) , this value is 0 in table and should be e.g. 500 €, shown in tx PA20.

 

Thx

entry.title: Re: deleted custom configuration from component FPM_FORM_...
entry.content:
Hi @roshanwa12071998 

It might not be same, but similar one came across. 
might helpful for you, please check below link which contains accepted answer

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sap-mdg-500-error-type-not-found/qaq-p/13756290

Thanks, 
Sandeep Suggu.
SAP Master Data Governance

entry.title: Re: Build a dynamic rolling forecast with SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Excel
entry.content:
Great functionality and great blog!

It's great to see SAC planning is evolving toward the greater flexibility .. Although FC layout was quite capable as well, still it was difficult to satisfy some complex planning requirements. E.g. for scenarios where we need 3 versions in the template ( such as 9 actual + 3 forecast + 12 budget ) . This was a very common planning requirement .

Had a chance to try asymmetric filtering with 3 blocks and it works for this type of complex scenarios..

entry.title: Filtering absence time types for managers
entry.content:
Hello all,
I have a requirement to disallow managers from entering LOA absences on behalf of their direct reports while still being able to create non-LOA absences for the same employees.
I have currently created a take rule for the LOA absences displaying a message and throwing an error; but I would like to filter out the LOA absences so the managers are not presented with those time types.
Has anyone tried this? If so, please reach out with an outline of your solution or, even better, an example business rule to accomplish this.

Best regards
Kim 😉

entry.title: Re: SAP MDG Certificate
entry.content:
Hi @MY9 

Connect the people from LinkedIn, Now a days i see most of the people completed certification & posted, 
Get the inputs from several people, those who done. Then plan it & perform it.


Thanks, 
Sandeep Suggu.
SAP Master Data Governance

entry.title: Re: SAP MDG Certificate
entry.content: #sapmdg - Search by Hashtag In LinkedIn

entry.title: What is the reorganization run and when does it take place?
entry.content:
Dear Community,
for testing different pricing strategies in purchasing, I have created a variant condition in the purchasing info record. To test my custom condition type, I have set the deletion flag for the previously created variant condition. Now I would like to reactivate this same variant condition, however, I cannot untick deletion indicator (as expected) but I also cannot create a second line with the same Material/Variant/Validity combo. Clicking on F1 for the deletion indicator, it gives me the following information: 

My questions is: What is the reorganization run and when does it take place? Can I somehow trigger the run manually, so that I can re-create my variant condition?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: #SITREC2024 🎤 Abertura - Key Note
entry.content:
Palestrantes

Cláudia Daniele – Ativa na SAP Community, com experiência em implementação de soluções SAP em setores variados. Engajada em iniciativas de compartilhamento de conhecimento e mentoria.

@Marssel700 – Especialista em SAP com foco em colaboração comunitária. Participa de grupos de estudo e workshops, contribuindo para o desenvolvimento técnico e relacional.

@marco_v_santos – Profissional SAP Community conhecido por facilitar networking e promover eventos locais. Atua integrando profissionais em torno de boas práticas e tecnologias emergentes.

 

Descrição da palestra

A palestra de abertura do SAP Inside Track Recife 2024 teve como foco apresentar o evento, reforçar a força da comunidade SAP na região e apresentar a programação e objetivos desta edição. Os palestrantes compartilharam suas visões sobre os desafios e oportunidades atuais no Brasil, convidando todos para uma jornada de aprendizado e networking.

Conteúdo do blog com resumo da palestra

1. Boas-vindas e contexto

Os palestrantes iniciaram com agradecimentos aos participantes, patrocinadores e apoiadores, reforçando que o SAP Inside Track Recife se firmou desde sua primeira edição em 2016 como referência para quem busca aprendizado, troca de experiências e networking youtube.com+3youtube.com+3community.sap.com+3.

2. Importância da comunidade

Destacaram o valor da comunidade SAP não apenas como fórum de discussão técnica, mas como instrumento para desenvolvimento profissional, trocas colaborativas e oportunidades de mentoria. Reforçaram a cultura de “compartilhar para aprender”, central ao SAP Inside Track.

3. Inovações e tendências SAP

Foram abordadas tendências como transformação digital com SAP S/4HANA, integração de soluções cloud e automação. Mesclaram visões estratégicas com ressaltas sobre as necessidades específicas do mercado nordestino, expondo cases locais e regionais para inspirar os participantes.

4. Estrutura do evento

Apresentaram a agenda completa: trilhas técnicas (ABAP, Basis, CI/CD, Fiori), painéis com especialistas e sessões interativas. Mencionaram stands de patrocinadores, oportunidades de carreira e espaços para networking.

5. Chamado à participação

Finalizaram convidando todos os presentes a se engajarem ativamente: perguntar, compartilhar suas experiências, participar das discussões e fazer parte da comunidade de forma efetiva, aproveitando a riqueza do contato pessoal e coletivo.

Conclusão

A key‑note cumpriu seu objetivo principal de criar uma atmosfera de entusiasmo e pertencimento, conectando o propósito do SAP Inside Track Recife à trajetória e atuação dos palestrantes. Com um panorama claro do evento, dos temas e das oportunidades em SAP, deixou os participantes motivados e preparados para as trilhas subsequentes.

se você deseja ser notificado sobre os próximos eventos SAP Inside Track no Brasil, entre na nossa lista de interesse: Cadastre-se aqui para ser notificado

entry.title: #SITREC2024 🎤 Maximizando o Valor do S/4HANA
entry.content:
Bio do Palestrante

@Marssel700 atua como SAP FICO Lead com vasta experiência em implementação e evolução de módulos financeiros e controle gerencial dentro de ambientes SAP. É um influente membro da comunidade SAP, contribuindo com discussões técnicas, melhores práticas e mentorias voltadas a execução de projetos complexos de FICO. Sua atuação oferece insights valiosos tanto para iniciantes quanto para especialistas no módulo financeiro.

Descrição da Palestra

Durante aproximadamente 45 minutos, Marssel apresenta um panorama completo sobre SAP FICO focado em:

  • Os principais desafios enfrentados em projetos (tributação, fechamento contábil, integração com outros módulos);

  • Estratégias para mitigar riscos e acelerar entregas via configuração adequada e automatização;

  • Abordagem do controle interno e avaliação de performance financeira;

  • Casos reais de sucesso que demonstram ganhos em eficiência, redução de erros e governança.

Resumo da Palestra

1. Contextualização da Comunidade SAP Recife

A palestra inicia com uma breve contextualização da SAP Community Recife, destacando a importância de eventos locais como o SAP Inside Track para fomentar trocas de conhecimento e networking profissional.

2. Apresentação do Palestrante

Após as boas-vindas, Marssel é apresentado como o responsável pela palestra, trazendo seu histórico em projetos SAP FICO complexos.

3. Desafios Comuns em Projetos SAP FICO

Marssel lista os principais obstáculos enfrentados por equipes FICO:

  • Estrutura tributária variável conforme regiões e legislações;

  • Fechamento contábil rígido e com curtos prazos;

  • Integração com módulos SD, MM e payroll;

  • Alta demanda por relatórios gerenciais customizados.

4. Boas Práticas e Soluções

Para cada desafio, são sugeridas práticas e soluções:

  • Automação de cálculos tributários via BRF+ ou funcionalidades SAP JV;

  • Adoção de processos de fechamento acelerado com controle diário;

  • Utilização de FI‑CO interface para garantir consistência entre módulos;

  • Implantação de relatórios em real‑time com SAP Analytics Cloud.

5. Casos de Sucesso

Baseado em experiências reais, Marssel detalha alguns cases:

  • Reestruturação de centro de custos que resultou em redução de 30 % no tempo de fechamento;

  • Redução de 40 % nos erros manuais por meio de automação de processos SAP;

  • Implantação de dashboards para acompanhamento em tempo real de KPIs financeiros, permitindo reação imediata a desvios.

6. Conclusão e Bibliografia

Nos minutos finais, Marssel reforça:

  • A necessidade de investimento em conhecimento e treinamento focado em SAP FICO;

  • A importância da comunidade para troca de experiências;

  • Referência a materiais consultados, artigos e orientações para aprofundamento futuro.

Considerações Finais

A palestra de Marssel Vilaça no SAP Inside Track Recife 2024 oferece uma visão prática e madura sobre a gestão do SAP FICO: do diagnóstico de dificuldades operacionais até a implementação de estratégias eficazes. Com conteúdo alinhado à realidade do mercado, Marssel proporciona uma fonte valiosa de inspiração para profissionais que atuam ou desejam se aprofundar nos domínios financeiro e de controlling no SAP.

O conteúdo é recomendável para:

  • Consultores SAP FICO em qualquer estágio de carreira;

  • Analistas financeiros e controllers que utilizam o SAP;

  • Líderes de TI e gestores que buscam otimizar operações financeiras e aumentar a governança no sistema.

Para quem quer melhorar o domínio em SAP FICO, esta apresentação é uma excelente referência de caminho e reforça o valor da comunidade SAP na construção de práticas de sucesso.

 

 

Se você deseja ser notificado sobre os próximos eventos SAP Inside Track no Brasil, entre na nossa lista de interesse: Cadastre-se aqui para ser notificado
